container.title: Todo
view.name: Todo List
config.title: Todo List
config.colors.high: Accent color for high-priority items (e.g. `#f14c4c`, `red`, `var(--vscode-charts-red)`). Leave empty to use the theme color.
config.colors.med: Accent color for medium-priority items. Leave empty to use the theme color.
config.colors.low: Accent color for low-priority items. Leave empty to use the theme color.
config.colors.doneOpacity: Opacity of completed items (0–1, e.g. `0.5`). Leave empty to use the default (0.55).
cmd.setupClaudeCode: Todo: Set up Claude Code integration
